info.title: PublishActions
info.description: Publish articles to the Hugo GitHub repository

post.summary: Commit a Hugo markdown article and its image to GitHub
post.description: Uses the GitHub REST API to commit both the article markdown (with frontmatter) and its featured image into the repository. If the article slug already exists, it is updated (idempotent). GitHub Actions will automatically trigger a Hugo rebuild and deployment.

category.description: One of: Business, Entertainment, Other, Politics, Sports, Technology, US, World

content.description: Full article body in markdown. Must include the {{< articlead >}} shortcode after the 2nd paragraph.

image_s3_key.description: S3 key of the featured image, e.g. posts/uuid.png

image_prompt.description: The DALL-E prompt used to generate the image (stored in frontmatter)

source.description: Original news source name, e.g. CNN

original_url.description: URL of the original news article

github_file_path.description: Path of the markdown file in the repo

article_url.description: Expected live URL once deployment completes

already_existed.description: True if the slug was already in the repo (updated, not created)
